title: Application fails to launch after update
description: Users report that the application does not start or crashes immediately after an update.
solutions:
**Clear Application Cache:** Navigate to `~/.config/excel-for-linux/` and delete the `Cache` and `Code Cache` directories. Restart the application.
**Reinstall the Application:** Completely uninstall the current version, download the latest release from GitHub, and perform a clean installation.

title: Blank screen or login loop
description: The application shows a blank screen or keeps redirecting to the login page.
solutions:
**Clear stored session data:** Remove `~/.config/excel-for-linux/` (or `~/snap/excel-for-linux/current/.config/excel-for-linux/` for snap installs) and restart.
**Check network connectivity:** Ensure office.com is reachable from your network.

title: Custom CSS not applying
description: User-defined custom CSS does not appear to take effect.
solutions:
**Verify the CSS file path** in your `~/.config/excel-for-linux/config.json` under `customCSSName`.
**Check CSS syntax** for errors.
**Restart the application** after making changes to the config file.
